exercises.q: My sister has ___ many new friends since starting at the new school.
exercises.exp: friends = tạo ra mối quan hệ → make friends

exercises.q: You should ___ a reservation at the restaurant before we go.
exercises.exp: reservation = sắp xếp trước → make a reservation

exercises.q: I ___ very well in my job interview and felt confident about the results.
exercises.exp: well = kết quả hoạt động → do well

exercises.q: The chef is ___ a new recipe that combines Italian and Japanese cuisine.
exercises.exp: recipe = tạo ra công thức mới → make a recipe

exercises.q: We need to ___ some research before launching the new product.
exercises.exp: research = nghiên cứu (tác vụ) → do research

exercises.q: The loud noise from the construction site ___ everyone nervous and anxious.
exercises.exp: made (someone) + tính từ = làm cho cảm thấy → make

exercises.q: I always ___ the ironing while watching my favourite TV series.
exercises.exp: ironing = tác vụ nhà → do the ironing

exercises.q: She finally ___ a difficult decision to leave her corporate job and travel the world.
exercises.exp: decision = tạo ra quyết định → make a decision

exercises.q: Taking a walk in nature will ___ you good after a stressful week.
exercises.exp: good = có lợi cho sức khỏe → do you good

exercises.q: He forgot to ___ his homework and got in trouble with the teacher.
exercises.exp: homework = tác vụ học tập

exercises.q: I need to ___ a list of everything I want to buy at the supermarket.
exercises.exp: list = tạo ra danh sách

exercises.q: The children always ___ a mess in the living room after playing.
exercises.exp: mess = tạo ra sự bừa bộn

exercises.q: Can I ___ you a coffee? You look like you need one after the meeting.
exercises.exp: coffee = pha chế đồ uống

exercises.q: She ___ very badly in the driving test and had to take it again.
exercises.exp: badly = kết quả không tốt

exercises.q: They decided to ___ plans for their summer vacation in advance.
exercises.exp: plans = lập kế hoạch

exercises.q: It's considered rude to ___ fun of someone because of their appearance.
exercises.exp: fun of = chế giễu

exercises.q: I have to ___ the laundry before I run out of clean clothes.
exercises.exp: laundry = tác vụ giặt giũ

exercises.q: The scientist ___ an important discovery that could change medicine forever.
exercises.exp: discovery = tạo ra phát hiện

exercises.q: Please ___ sure to lock the door before you leave the house.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về việc tổ chức một sự kiện đặc biệt (sinh nhật, tiệc, cưới) – bạn đã lên kế hoạch và chuẩn bị những gì
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Do vs Make collocations: make arrangements, do the planning, make a list, do the shopping, make a promise, do the decorations
writing_prompts.example: Last year, I decided to organise a surprise birthday party for my best friend, and it required a lot of careful planning and coordination. First, I made a list of all the guests to invite and did the research to find out her favourite restaurant for the venue. I made arrangements with the restaurant manager to book a private room and made a reservation for twenty people. I also made a promise to my friend that we would spend the day together, but secretly I planned the party instead. I did the shopping for decorations and made sure to buy balloons and banners in her favourite colour. My mother helped me do the cooking for the party, and we made a delicious three-tier cake together. Before the event, I made phone calls to all the guests to confirm their attendance. On the day itself, everything went perfectly, and my friend was completely surprised. Making her cry happy tears was the best reward I could have asked for.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả quá trình chuẩn bị cho một bài thuyết trình quan trọng – bạn đã làm gì để chuẩn bị và kết quả như thế nào
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Do vs Make for professional tasks: do research, make notes, do a presentation, make suggestions, do your best, make a good impression
writing_prompts.example: When I was asked to make a presentation at an international conference last month, I knew I had to do careful preparation to make a good impression on the audience. First, I did extensive research on the topic and made notes about all the key points I wanted to cover. I made a detailed outline of my presentation and did several practice runs in front of my colleagues to get their feedback. Based on their suggestions, I made improvements to both the content and the visual aids. I made sure to prepare answers for likely questions that might come up during the Q&A session. On the day of the presentation, I made sure to arrive early to do a final check of all the equipment. When I finally made my presentation, I did my best to speak clearly and confidently. The audience seemed engaged, and afterward, several people made positive comments about my work. Doing well in that presentation helped me make valuable contacts in my field.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về việc bắt đầu một thói quen mới tốt cho sức khỏe – bạn đã thay đổi những gì và cảm nhận ra sao
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Do vs Make for health activities: do exercise, do yoga, do your best, make healthy choices, make time, do the shopping
writing_prompts.example: Six months ago, I made a decision to improve my health and adopt a healthier lifestyle, which required me to make significant changes to my daily routine. First, I made time in my busy schedule to do exercise every morning before work. I started doing yoga and made it a habit to practice for at least thirty minutes daily. At the supermarket, I made a list of healthy foods I needed to buy and made sure to do the shopping only once a week to avoid impulse purchases. I also started doing the cooking at home instead of eating out, which helped me make healthier choices about what I ate. Making these changes was not easy at first, but I did my best to stay motivated. The results have been remarkable – I have more energy, I sleep better, and people say I look healthier. These improvements have made a huge difference in my quality of life, and I am glad I made the decision to change.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về một ngày làm việc bận rộn – bạn phải làm những công việc gì và bạn đã xử lý ra sao
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Do vs Make for work tasks: do the work, make phone calls, make a report, do the dishes, make arrangements, do the shopping, make decisions
writing_prompts.example: Yesterday was one of the busiest days I have experienced in my career, and I had to make the most of every single minute. I started by making a list of all the tasks I needed to complete and made a schedule to organise my time effectively. First, I did the paperwork that had been piling up over the weekend and made phone calls to several important clients to follow up on pending deals. I had to make a decision about which project to prioritise, so I made a quick analysis of the deadlines and potential profits. Then I did a presentation for the senior management team and made sure to highlight the key achievements of my department. After that, I made arrangements for the upcoming conference and did the shopping for office supplies that we urgently needed. Despite the pressure, I did my best to stay calm and focused. By the end of the day, I had made significant progress on several important projects. Although I was exhausted, making it through such a demanding day gave me a great sense of accomplishment.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả việc giải quyết một vấn đề khó khăn – bạn đã phân tích vấn đề, đưa ra giải pháp và học được bài học gì
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Do vs Make for problem-solving: do research, make a plan, make a mistake, do the analysis, make suggestions, do your best, make a decision
writing_prompts.example: Last semester, I faced a serious problem with a group project at university, and resolving it required careful thought and communication. First, I did some research to understand what had gone wrong in our collaboration, and I made notes about all the issues we needed to address. I made a plan to meet with my teammates and made a list of suggestions for improving our future work. During our discussion, I made a decision to take on more responsibility since some group members were not doing their share of the work. I made phone calls to coordinate our meetings and made sure everyone understood their tasks clearly. Unfortunately, I made a mistake by taking on too much work alone, and I ended up feeling overwhelmed and exhausted. I had to make an apology to my teammates for not communicating my struggles earlier. We learned from our mistakes and made changes to our working process. In the end, we did well on the project and received a good grade. This experience taught me that making time for honest communication is essential for successful collaboration.
